spec.query:
from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] =~ /^${operator:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] != "Watermarks")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> group(columns: ["operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Throughput")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsInPerSecond")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] =~ /^${operator:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] != "Watermarks")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> group(columns: ["operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Throughput")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_taskSlotsTotal" or 
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_taskSlotsAvailable" or 
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_numRegisteredTaskManagers")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "Status")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /.*Status_JVM_GarbageCollector_G1_Young_Generation_Count/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> toFloat()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      component: if r.host =~ /.*jobmanager.*/ then "JobManager" else "TaskManagers Mean"
     }))
  |> group(columns: ["component"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "component"])
  |> yield(name: "gc_stable")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /.*Status_JVM_GarbageCollector_G1_Young_Generation_Time/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> toFloat()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      component: if r.host =~ /.*jobmanager.*/ then "JobManager" else "TaskManagers Mean"
     }))
  |> group(columns: ["component", "host"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["component"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "component"])
  |> yield(name: "gc_time_stable")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsInPerSecond"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["operator_name"] =~ /.*Source.*/)
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] >= 0.0)

  |> group(columns: ["operator_name", "subtask_index"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", usePrevious: true)

  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")

  |> group()
  |> yield(name: "Throughput_E2E_IN_Total")

import "regexp"
import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] =~ /^taskmanager_job_task_latency.*latency$/
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "mean")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /.*Writer.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      writer = regexp.replaceAllString(
        r: /^.*->\s*/,
        v: r.task_name,
        t: ""
      )

      q = regexp.findString(r: /Q[0-9]+/, v: writer)

      w =
        if strings.containsStr(v: writer, substr: "Global") then "Global"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: writer, substr: "1h") then "1h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: writer, substr: "6h") then "6h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: writer, substr: "1d") then "1d"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: writer, substr: "7d") then "7d"
        else "Final"

      return {
        r with
        series: "Mean " + q + ": " + w
      }
  })
  |> group(columns: ["series"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Latency_Mean_Final_Writers")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["operator_name"] =~ /^Q[1-3]:.*Sink: Writer$/)
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] >= 0.0)

  |> group(columns: ["operator_name", "subtask_index"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", usePrevious: true)

  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")

  |> group()
  |> yield(name: "Throughput_E2E_OUT_Total")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_lastCheckpointSize")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "Checkpoints")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["operator_name"] =~ /^Q[1-3]:.*Sink: Writer$/)
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] >= 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      query: if strings.hasPrefix(v: r.operator_name, prefix: "Q1") then "Query 1"
             else if strings.hasPrefix(v: r.operator_name, prefix: "Q2") then "Query 2"
             else if strings.hasPrefix(v: r.operator_name, prefix: "Q3") then "Query 3"
             else "Other"
  }))

  // 1. Mantieni separati i vari writer della stessa query
  |> group(columns: ["query", "operator_name", "subtask_index"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(column: "_value", usePrevious: true)

  // 2. Somma tutti i writer/subtask della stessa query
  |> group(columns: ["query", "_time"])
  |> sum(column: "_value")

  // 3. Una curva per query
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> yield(name: "Throughput_OUT_Per_Query")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_isBackPressured")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      r with 
      cleaned_task: strings.split(v: r.task_name, t: " -> ")[0] 
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["cleaned_task"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if string(v: r._value) == "true" or string(v: r._value) == "1" then 1 else 0 }))
  |> yield(name: "Backpressure")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_busyTimeMsPerSecond")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      cleaned_task: strings.split(v: r.task_name, t: " -> ")[0],
      _value: float(v: r._value) / 10.0
     }))
  
  |> group(columns: ["cleaned_task"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "busy_time_per_task")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_Shuffle_Netty_Input_Buffers_inPoolUsage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      cleaned_task: strings.split(v: r.task_name, t: " -> ")[0]
     }))
  |> group(columns: ["cleaned_task"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "netty_input_usage")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_Shuffle_Netty_Output_Buffers_outPoolUsage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      cleaned_task: strings.split(v: r.task_name, t: " -> ")[0]
     }))
  |> group(columns: ["cleaned_task"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "netty_output_usage")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_total_late_records_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "count")
  |> group(columns: ["operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "custom_late_tracks_rate")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_max_lateness_minutes_absolute")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_field", "operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "lateness_percentiles")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_currentInputWatermark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) }))
  |> group(columns: ["operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "operators_event_time")

spec.title: Allineamento tra le Partizioni (Watermark Partition Drift)

spec.query:
from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_currentInputWatermark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /.*Kafka Source.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) }))
  |> group(columns: ["subtask_index"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "partition_watermarks")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_lastCheckpointRestoreTimestamp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

import "regexp"
import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] =~ /^taskmanager_job_task_operator_processing_latency_.*_e2e_oldest_ms_p95$/
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0.0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /.*Sink: Writer.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "Global"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      q = regexp.findString(r: /Q[0-9]+/, v: r.task_name)

      w =
        if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "1h") then "1h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "6h") then "6h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "1d") then "1d"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "7d") then "7d"
        else "Final"

      return {
        r with
        series: "P95 Oldest " + q + ": " + w
      }
  })

  // Max tra subtask e campioni nella finestra
  |> group(columns: ["series"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

  |> yield(name: "E2E_Latency_Oldest_P95")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /^taskmanager_job_task_latency.*latency$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "mean") 
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      r with 
      cleaned_task: strings.split(v: r.task_name, t: " -> ")[0] 
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["cleaned_task"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Mean Latency")

import "strings"

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0.0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /.*Sink: Writer.*/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "Global"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      q = regexp.findString(r: /Q[0-9]+/, v: r.task_name)

      w =
        if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "1h") then "1h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "6h") then "6h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "1d") then "1d"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "7d") then "7d"
        else "Final"

      return {
        r with
        series: "P95 Avg " + q + ": " + w
      }
  })

  // Max tra subtask e campioni nella finestra
  |> group(columns: ["series"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

  |> yield(name: "E2E_Latency_Avg_P95")

import "regexp"
import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] =~ /^taskmanager_job_task_operator_processing_latency_.*_e2e_newest_ms_p95$/

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0.0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /.*Sink: Writer.*/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => {

      w =
        if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "Global") then "Global"

        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "6h") then "6h"
        else if strings.containsStr(v: r.task_name, substr: "1d") then "1d"

        else "Final"

      return {
        r with

      }
  })

  |> group(columns: ["series"])

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_lastCheckpointDuration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "job_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "Checkpoints")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_numberOfCompletedCheckpoints" or 
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_numberOfInProgressCheckpoints" or
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_numberOfFailedCheckpoints")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  // Prendiamo il valore più recente (last) visto che sono contatori incrementali
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "CheckpointCounts")

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_CPU_Load")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

import "strings"

from(bucket: "restored-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_Memory_Heap_Used" or r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_Memory_Heap_Max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      r with 
      type: if r._measurement == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_Memory_Heap_Used" then "Used Heap" else "Max Heap",
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["host", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.measurementTagValues(bucket: "restored-metrics", measurement: "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond", tag: "task_name")

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.measurementTagValues(bucket: "restored-metrics", measurement: "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond", tag: "operator_name")
